---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

> Example: "When I have many cron jobs, I can't quickly find a specific one because there's no search field."

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Describe the user experience or implementation idea.

> Example: "Add a search input at the top of the Cron page that filters tasks by name in real-time."

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Mockups / sketches

If UI-related, attach a wireframe, screenshot of similar UX from another tool, or rough sketch.

## Additional context

- Would this require backend changes, frontend only, or both?
- Are there cross-platform concerns (Win/Linux/macOS)?
- Is this a blocker for your workflow or a nice-to-have?
